title: blick.group — Marketing Website
essence: The blick.group website is a digital business card backed by a working knowledge library. Big photography of real rigs and real crews. Generous whitespace. Confident orange anchors. Field-credible, not breathless. It says: we have been in the field for years, our products perform, and we will pick up the phone. It does not say: we are a venture-backed disruptor reimagining drilling.
audience: Drillers, owner-operators, site managers in their 40s–60s across AU and NZ. Practical, phone-first, often viewing on mobile from a job site.

Brand.name: Brand Orange
Brand.role: Primary CTAs, key links, section anchors. One anchor per section.

Neutrals.name: Ink
Neutrals.role: Headings and primary text on light.

Neutrals.name: Section Dark
Neutrals.role: Dark sections — case studies, full-bleed photo.

Eco.name: Eco Accent
Eco.role: Eco range surfaces only. Never on non-eco pages.

typeScale.label: web-h1
typeScale.sample: Quality fluids paired with expert advice.

typeScale.label: web-h2
typeScale.sample: Why teams across AU and NZ choose Blick.

typeScale.label: web-h3
typeScale.sample: Carry-Flow on a tough HDD job in WA.

typeScale.label: web-lead
typeScale.sample: We help drilling crews across Australia and New Zealand get a better result on every job.

typeScale.label: web-body
typeScale.sample: When you need product, advice, or support, we show up. Every time. Stock on site in 48 hours, and a name to call when something needs solving on the spot.

fonts.use: All web type — headings, body, captions.
fonts.why: We hold the licence and the brand book mandates it. Sans-only on web keeps the field-credible voice — no editorial flourish.

fonts.use: Spec values, batch numbers, PDS/SDS technical data.
fonts.why: Tabular numerals so spec tables and batch IDs align cleanly.

spacing.label: x24
spacing.use: Desktop section spacing — generous and structural.

spacing.label: x32
spacing.use: Hero vertical padding on the homepage.

radii.label: md
radii.use: Buttons. Smaller than hub-app — web reads as flatter.

shadows.label: header
shadows.use: Sticky header on scroll. Only chrome on the page.

do: Lead with real field photography from Blick jobs.
Specifics: timeframes, regions, named products, real numbers.
Plain English first, technical detail in expandable spec tables.
Disclose entity (NZ vs AU) on regional contact lines.
dont: Don't use rotating heroes or carousels.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradients-for-decoration, or animated background blobs.
Don't lead AU pages with NZ heritage.
